entries.source: "Explain recursion in JavaScript"
entries.value: "Razloži rekurzijo v JavaScriptu"

entries.source: "Help debug this error"
entries.value: "Pomagaj odpraviti to napako"

entries.source: "Teach me Python loops"
entries.value: "Nauči me zank v Pythonu"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Code Tutor on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Praktični vodnik za uporabo Code Tutor na inspir za STEM učenje, s pozivi, učnimi zankami in varnejšimi navadami pri UI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Jača studijska petlja

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: UI učitelj

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi korak, a ne končni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vprašajte UI da preverite svoje razmišljanje, a ne samo rezultat.

entries.source: Beginner and intermediate programmers who need explanations, debugging help, or project coaching.
entries.value: Začetni in srednje izkušeni programerji, ki potrebujejo razlage, pomoč pri odpravljanju napak ali mentorstvo pri projektih.

entries.source: Code Tutor
entries.value: Učitelj programiranja

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Šifra Tutor za učenje Programiranje By Building je fokusiran način za uporaba UI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Način je izgradžen oko specifičnog posla: Razumjeti kod, napake v ispravljanju grešaka, učiti koncepte in graditi male projekte korak za korakom.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Explain the bug.
entries.value: Razloži bubu.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Završite pisanjem ideje iz memorije.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Traži da pokušate

entries.source: Start the live mode at Code Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Pokrenite način života kod Code Tutora. Ako želite susjedni oblik učenja, pokušajte projekt Trener. Za širi pogled na platformu, pročitajte kar UI učeči pratilac treba učiniti za svakoga.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Recite načinu rada kar pokušavate naučiti ali proizvesti.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Ta se razlika pojavljuje v protoku. Umjesto jedne divovske reakcije, najbolje seje kreču kroz petlju: postaviti cilj, pokušati nekar, dobiti povratne informacije, popraviti slabu točku, in odabrati sljedeču akciju.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: To je važno. Opčenito chatbot lahko odgovoriti gotovo na sve, ali način učenja daje razgovor oblik. To vas potiče prema vrsti razmišljanja, prakse, povratne informacije, ali raziščivanja ki pomaže ideja štap.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Tutor vpraša, kaj pričakuješ od kode, nato pa z majhnimi primeri in testi pomaga, da delovanje postane jasno.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: To je ista navika za proučavanje z UI bez varanja: zadržati učenca aktivan. UI je najkorisniji ko vam daje povratnu informaciju o vašem razmišljanju.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ovaj način rada posebno je koristen za učence ki žele:

entries.source: Try a small fix.
entries.value: Pokušajte malo popraviti.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Pokušajte korak v svojim riječima.

entries.source: Understand the concept.
entries.value: Razumijete koncept.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Code Tutor, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: S čime ta način rada pomaže

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Gdje iči sljedeče

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Lahko takodžer začeti z grubom verzijom vašeg pravog problema. Neuredan prvi prompt je v redu. Sekcija lahko pojasniti razinu, publiku, rok, in stil nakon kar počnete.
